'''rangoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mckelveyite|mckelveyite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mckelveyite|mckelveyite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rangoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rængeseth|rængeseth]] || [[word:rængesej|rængesej]] || [[word:rængesesh|rængesesh]] || [[word:rængese|rængese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rangongosoth|rangongosoth]] || [[word:rangongosoj|rangongosoj]] || [[word:rangongososh|rangongososh]] || [[word:rangongoso|rangongoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rangosoth|rangosoth]] || [[word:rangosoj|rangosoj]] || [[word:rangososh|rangososh]] || [[word:rangoso|rangoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rangofsoth|rangofsoth]] || [[word:rangofsoj|rangofsoj]] || [[word:rangofsosh|rangofsosh]] || [[word:rangofsof|rangofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rangosotho|rangosotho]] || [[word:rangosojo|rangosojo]] || [[word:rangososho|rangososho]] || [[word:rangosoko|rangosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rangosoth|rangosoth]] || [[word:rangosoj|rangosoj]] || [[word:rangososh|rangososh]] || [[word:rangoso|rangoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rangosothol|rangosothol]] || [[word:rangosojol|rangosojol]] || [[word:rangososhol|rangososhol]] || [[word:rangosokol|rangosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rangosothotho|rangosothotho]] || [[word:rangosojojo|rangosojojo]] || [[word:rangososhosho|rangososhosho]] || [[word:rangosoko|rangosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rangosothon|rangosothon]] || [[word:rangosojon|rangosojon]] || [[word:rangososhon|rangososhon]] || [[word:rangosokon|rangosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rangosothoro|rangosothoro]] || [[word:rangosojoro|rangosojoro]] || [[word:rangososhoro|rangososhoro]] || [[word:rangosokoro|rangosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
